title: solidago virgaurea subsp. centiflora
intro: Solidago virgaurea subsp. centiflora, also known as the goldenrod, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, with its leaves and flowers possessing anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to have medicinal properties. The health benefits of Solidago virgaurea subsp. centiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
